records.m_Talk_ENG: I still can't detect Senior Jackson's signal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still can't detect Senior Jackson's signal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still can't detect Senior Jackson's signal.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It might be due to the strong Corruption rays. Perhaps we should take a look around ourselv
8g Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It might be due to the strong Corruption rays. Perhaps we should take a look around ourselv
8g Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It might be due to the strong Corruption rays. Perhaps we should take a look around ourselv
8g Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The detector is picking up an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The detector is picking up an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The detector is picking up an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't triangulate the location, but it seems to be close by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't triangulate the location, but it seems to be close by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't triangulate the location, but it seems to be close by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Increase the detector's detection range
records.m_Talk_DEU: Increase the detector's detection range
records.m_Talk_FRA: Increase the detector's detection range

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Um? Is anyone there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Um? Is anyone there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Um? Is anyone there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a person trapped here. Could anyone please help me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a person trapped here. Could anyone please help me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a person trapped here. Could anyone please help me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! It's a distress call!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! It's a distress call!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! It's a distress call!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We should go
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We should go
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We should go
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be bait?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be bait?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be bait?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it seems so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it seems so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it seems so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bait...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bait...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bait...? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Brecht. That radio was sent from coordinates where the Corruption rays are most dense, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Brecht. That radio was sent from coordinates where the Corruption rays are most dense, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Brecht. That radio was sent from coordinates where the Corruption rays are most dense, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not only would it be unlikely for someone stranded there to survive, but the voice would not sound that calm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not only would it be unlikely for someone stranded there to survive, but the voice would not sound that calm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not only would it be unlikely for someone stranded there to survive, but the voice would not sound that calm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then that voice is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then that voice is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then that voice is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's highly likely to be a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's highly likely to be a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's highly likely to be a Shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They detect living beings and use all possible means to lure them into their territory and ambush them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They detect living beings and use all possible means to lure them into their territory and ambush them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They detect living beings and use all possible means to lure them into their territory and ambush them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Is the Counterside all like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Is the Counterside all like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Is the Counterside all like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two stay here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two stay here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two stay here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. You're going alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. You're going alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. You're going alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima and I will go instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fatima and I will go instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fatima and I will go instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you say so, then we'll wait here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you say so, then we'll wait here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you say so, then we'll wait here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything happens, please let out a shout.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything happens, please let out a shout.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything happens, please let out a shout.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no information of that sort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no information of that sort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no information of that sort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shouldn't we stop him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shouldn't we stop him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shouldn't we stop him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That... sounds cool and all, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That... sounds cool and all, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That... sounds cool and all, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I think I should go help
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I think I should go help
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I think I should go help
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! My arm...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch! My arm...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch! My arm...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from the Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please trust him and cooperate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please trust him and cooperate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please trust him and cooperate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Helloooo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Helloooo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Helloooo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reach my hand out toward the voice
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reach my hand out toward the voice
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reach my hand out toward the voice

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pull what is assumed to be a head
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pull what is assumed to be a head
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pull what is assumed to be a head

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be stuck between a rock.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be stuck between a rock.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be stuck between a rock.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!
records.m_Talk_DEU: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!
records.m_Talk_FRA: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, sure thing! Of course!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, sure thing! Of course!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, sure thing! Of course!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'll try not to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'll try not to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'll try not to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear footsteps.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear footsteps.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear footsteps.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? But you came alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? But you came alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? But you came alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAAAA!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WHOAAAA!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WHOAAAA!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? That head...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? That head...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? That head...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? That voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? That voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that Lotus' official gangster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that Lotus' official gangster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that Lotus' official gangster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The head... is talking...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The head... is talking...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The head... is talking...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha... Ah hah hah hah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha... Ah hah hah hah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we should still go check it out. There is a one-in-a-million-chance, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two stay here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two stay here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two stay here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. You're going alone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. You're going alone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. You're going alone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima and I will go instead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fatima and I will go instead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fatima and I will go instead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The transmission came from a place with the highest Corruption ray values, even in the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest of Counters will be in danger after being exposed to that kind of Corruption ray.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that means that you'll be in more danger. You're just an ordinary person, Boss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry too much about me. I'll be right back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you say so, then we'll wait here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you say so, then we'll wait here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you say so, then we'll wait here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If anything happens, please let out a shout.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If anything happens, please let out a shout.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If anything happens, please let out a shout.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to scream at the top of my lungs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Fatima, there are still secrets I don't know about, aren't there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like, for instance, Boss is actually a Super S Grade Counter that's the strongest in the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no information of that sort.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no information of that sort.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no information of that sort.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to my observation so far, the Supreme Administrator is likely to be an ordinary person with no abilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shouldn't we stop him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shouldn't we stop him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shouldn't we stop him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration that I know of never makes irresponsible decisions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even more so if it's the Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That... sounds cool and all, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That... sounds cool and all, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That... sounds cool and all, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought that Boss might have developed unfounded confidence due to the negative effect of the Corruption rays.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I think I should go help
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I think I should go help
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I think I should go help
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! My arm...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch! My arm...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch! My arm...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from the Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from the Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please trust him and cooperate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please trust him and cooperate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please trust him and cooperate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a pit of dense Corruption rays.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With light and sound blocked from the outside, it would be easy to hallucinate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Helloooo?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Helloooo?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Helloooo?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I heard a voice just now, and it's not an auditory hallucination, is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't mind, could you get me out of here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll head to you, but only if you don't attack me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Mr. Nice voice. I won't bite.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Above all else, I'm not in a state to hurt anyone at the moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? I hear the sound coming from below.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Could you reach out your hand?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reach my hand out toward the voice
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reach my hand out toward the voice
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reach my hand out toward the voice

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Groan* How long has it been since I felt the warmth of another person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you mind if I bite you, just once?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pull what is assumed to be a head
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pull what is assumed to be a head
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pull what is assumed to be a head

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry! I-I won't bite! Please don't hurt me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be stuck between a rock.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be stuck between a rock.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be stuck between a rock.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I found myself like this when I woke up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't get out, nor could I die. So, I was wondering if I had to stay trapped down here forever...

root.m_Talk_ENG: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!
root.m_Talk_DEU: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!
root.m_Talk_FRA: until I heard someone with a handsome... voice! That's you, my savior!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't die? Do you mean that you've already died and become a C.O. or a Shadow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a Shadow! Or at least, I don't think I am!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Maybe I did turn into one when I was out...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, please help me! If you get me out of here, I'll do anything you ask!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! I can give you money! I've got tons of it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... it's my master's money, to be exact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to pull you up now, so be careful. You might get hurt if you're not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, sure thing! Of course!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, sure thing! Of course!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, sure thing! Of course!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Feel free to pull me straight up. I'd actually like that
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, it's better than being trapped down here forever!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think a Shadow got to him before he could let out a scream?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing to worry about. I'm sure he'll be back safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You say that, but your leg's been shaking nervously since a while ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'll try not to do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'll try not to do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'll try not to do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hear footsteps.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hear footsteps.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hear footsteps.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Administrator, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Administrator, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Administrator, are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I'm fine, as you can see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? But you came alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? But you came alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? But you came alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I heard someone else's voice just now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you mention it, it's gotten really quiet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAAAA!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WHOAAAA!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WHOAAAA!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-th-that's a person's head! Why are you talking to a corpse?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. We were having a conversation up until now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eek... Snap out of it, Boss! Corpses can't talk...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? That head...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? That head...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? That head...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that Hicks, Chamber's official?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? That voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? That voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that Lotus' official gangster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that Lotus' official gangster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that Lotus' official gangster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The head... is talking...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The head... is talking...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The head... is talking...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha... Ah hah hah hah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha... Ah hah hah hah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha... Ah hah hah hah...
